dependencies: Third-party vendors for technology components, hardware, software, research and market data, connectivity, communication network infrastructure
Cloud hosting and data center services
Dependence on financial institutions as treasury service providers for settlement services
risks: Vendor failures or operational disruptions could impact service delivery
Third-party security breaches or cyberattacks on vendor systems
Inability to obtain treasury services could materially affect business operations
Vendor concentration risk - failure of vendors to meet obligations

regulatory_risks: Federal and state money transmission laws including USA PATRIOT Act and Bank Secrecy Act
State cybersecurity protection laws and data protection laws
EU Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA) - effective January 2025
Privacy laws: GDPR (EU), UK GDPR, CCPA/CPRA (California), VCDPA (Virginia), CPA (Colorado), CTDPA (Connecticut), LGPD (Brazil), PIPL (China), APPI (Japan)
GLBA privacy regulations and state privacy laws
Federal Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) and state consumer reporting laws
CFPB Unfair, Deceptive or Abusive Acts or Practices (UDAAP) regulations
Federal Fair Debt Collection Practices Act and state collection laws
Anti-money laundering laws: Bank Secrecy Act (US), Money Laundering Regulations (UK), Proceeds of Crime Act (UK), Criminal Finances Act (UK), EU Anti-Money Laundering Directives
Economic sanctions: OFAC (US), OFSI (UK), EU sanctions, UN sanctions
Anti-corruption laws: Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA), UK Bribery Act 2010
SEC and FINRA regulations for broker-dealer operations
FCA regulations (UK) including Consumer Duty requirements
Payment card industry digital security standards
AI laws and regulations - evolving globally including EU AI Act
Climate change legal and regulatory requirements
Export Administration Regulations and trade sanctions
FFIEC examination and oversight as Multi-Regional Data Processing Servicer (MDPS)
State banking regulations including Georgia Department of Banking and Finance
Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act
Investment Advisors Act of 1940
New York Department of Financial Services cybersecurity rules
State money transmitter licensing requirements

sanction_risks: Russia-Ukraine war impacts on global economic activity and transaction volumes
Middle East conflicts affecting transaction processing volumes
Protective trade policies and tariffs may restrict services in certain countries
